editorial_reasoning.calendar_tier: TIER 2 — Day after National Championship + NFL offseason workouts begin
editorial_reasoning.dominant_topic: Michigan championship aftermath dominates tweet volume, but day-after coverage requires fresh angles beyond just celebration

candidates_considered.hook: 37-year drought ends, Dusty May's miracle run, transfer portal success story
$90M All-Pro wants out, contract standoff with new coach
'It feels like a funeral' quote, NBA investigation ongoing
Mendoza visits Raiders, workouts start across league
Historic shooting performance in a loss is peak basketball absurdity

stories.headline: Dexter Lawrence Demands Trade from Giants After Contract Standoff
stories.editorial_direction: This is the lead — fresh breaking news with financial comedy angles. Focus on the timing (new coach arriving), contract falling from 3rd to 11th highest, and the absurdity of a $20M player sitting out voluntary workouts. Go deep on potential landing spots and what this means for Harbaugh's first season.

tweets.text:
ESPN sources: Giants All-Pro defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence has requested a trade and he will not be participating in the team's off-season workout program that opens Tuesday.

Lawrence and the Giants have been through two off seasons attempting to negotiate a contract reflecting his value to the Giants over the last three years, but there has not been any progress, per sources.

Dexter Lawrence has two years remaining on his deal and is currently scheduled to make $20 million this upcoming season.

Initially there had been optimism that with changes in the organization, discussions could move forward. But now that they haven't, new Giants head coach John Harbaugh will open his team's off-season program Tuesday without one of his best players.

key_stats: $90M extension in 2023 made him 3rd-highest paid DT
Now tied for 11th at position after market movement
$20M owed in 2026, $22M in 2027
Three Pro Bowls, two All-Pro selections since 2022
Half a sack in down 2025 season
research_notes.historical_context: Lawrence was drafted 17th overall by Giants in 2019. Contract extension came after breakout 2022 season with 7.5 sacks. Giants had league-worst 5.3 yards per rush in 2025.
key_moments: Trade request timed perfectly with John Harbaugh's first offseason program
GM Joe Schoen asked about Lawrence extension at NFL meetings last week
Previous trade rumors at 2025 deadline but Giants wanted significant return
cross_connections: John Harbaugh's first major crisis as Giants coach
Parallels to Quinnen Williams trade to Cowboys for first and second round picks
Giants rebuilding under new leadership after 4-13 season
meme_angles: All-Pro requesting trade from team that can't stop the run
Perfect timing to ruin new coach's first day
research_notes.where_it_goes: Multiple contenders calling already. Vikings, Texans, Chiefs all potential landing spots. Giants unlikely to get full value back given contract demands and down season.

stories.headline: Michigan Completes Miracle Run, Ends 37-Year Championship Drought
stories.editorial_direction: Day-after championship coverage focusing on the historical significance and Dusty May's incredible coaching job. Emphasize the transfer portal success story and how this validates the new college basketball model.

tweets.text:
Dan Orlovsky now has to wear a clip-on dangling Michigan earring for the next month on every show he appears.

If he misses a day, it starts over.

The Michigan Wolverines lost four straight National Championship games in '92, '93, '13, and '18.

37 years later… they finally get it done

For the first time in 37 years, the Michigan Wolverines have won the National Championship! 

They're last Championship was in 1989

key_stats: First title since 1989
37-3 final record
Elliot Cadeau led with 19 points
Michigan made 25 of 28 free throws
Beat UConn 69-63 to deny their third title in four years
research_notes.historical_context: Michigan lost title games in 1992, 1993, 2013, and 2018. Last title was 1989. Dusty May brought FAU to Final Four in 2023 before taking Michigan job.
key_moments: Started 0-for-11 from three before breaking through
First Big Ten title since Michigan State in 2000
cross_connections: Transfer portal success story under Dusty May
Validates new model of college basketball roster building
Michigan football and basketball both champions in recent years

stories.headline: Giannis and Bucks in Full-Scale War: 'It Feels Like a Funeral'
stories.editorial_direction: The 'funeral' quote is incredible content. Focus on how public this has gotten and the NBA investigation. This is a franchise star completely at odds with his organization.

tweets.text:
Jaden Ivey on IG LIVE: 

Jaden Ivey: "I got my wife here"

Wife: "Please stop"

Jaden Ivey: "She loves me. She loves God"
tweets.role: unrelated — cut this tweet, wrong story

key_stats: Giannis hasn't played since March 15 injury
Bucks eliminated from playoffs March 28
Team went 4-1 without Giannis late in season
NBA investigation ongoing into injury dispute
research_notes.historical_context: Giannis led Bucks to 2021 championship. Lost in first round 2022-23. Disappointing 2025-26 season with key departures of Lillard, Middleton, Lopez.
key_moments: Bobby Portis erupted at practice: 'This is why we suck'
'It feels like a funeral' quote from team insider
Giannis publicly declared himself healthy against team's medical staff
cross_connections: Similar to load management disputes but more public
Trade rumors involved Timberwolves, Heat, Warriors
meme_angles: Star player vs. organization going fully public

stories.headline: Grizzlies Tie NBA Record with 29 Threes, Still Lose by 16
stories.editorial_direction: This is peak basketball absurdity — historic shooting performance in a blowout loss. One tweet, quick hit on the math.

tweets.text:
Jokic this season:

— 1st in double-doubles 
— 1st in triple-doubles
— 1st in RPG
— 1st in APG
— 4th in TS%
— 6th in +/-
— 7th in PPG
— 10th in FG%

Averaging 28/13/11 on 57/38/83% shooting.

key_stats: Grizzlies made 29 three-pointers, tying NBA single-game record
Still lost 142-126 at home to Cavaliers
Historic shooting performance in a 16-point loss
meme_angles: Only the Grizzlies could break a record and still lose by 16
Peak modern NBA — 29 threes not enough

stories.headline: NFL Draft Intel: Mendoza Visits Raiders, Workouts Begin
stories.editorial_direction: Quick hit on draft season starting up. Presumptive #1 pick visiting the team with #1 pick is not news, but it's the start of draft season.

tweets.text: Presumptive No. 1 overall pick, Indiana QB Fernando Mendoza scheduled to visit today with the Las Vegas Raiders, the team that holds the No. 1 overall pick in the upcoming NFL draft.
Off-season workout programs begin today in Arizona, Atlanta, Buffalo, Cleveland, Las Vegas, Miami, the New York Giants, Pittsburgh and Tennessee.

key_stats: Mendoza presumptive #1 overall pick
Raiders hold #1 pick
Nine teams begin offseason workouts including Giants without Lawrence
meme_angles: Presumptive #1 pick visiting team with #1 pick is not exactly breaking news

around_the_league.text: North Carolina intends to hire longtime NBA coach Michael Malone as the school's next basketball coach, per ESPN's @PeteThamel. He's an NBA Championship coach with the Denver Nuggets from the 2022-23 season and has won 510 games as an NBA head coach.
